title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
* Cash withdrawal limit of Rs. 75,000/- and make purchases worth Rs. 75,000/- in a day at Point of Sale (POS).
  * 1 loyalty point for every Rs. 100 spent on the Debit Card.


Cash withdrawal limit of Rs. 75,000/- and make purchases worth Rs. 75,000/- in a day at Point of Sale (POS). 
The Gold Debit Card can be used both in India and abroad to make purchases at Merchant locations and withdraw local currency at ATMs. The customer is debited in INR. All transactions are reflected in the account statement in INR and merchant location details are captured.
Customers will gain one loyalty point for every Rs. 100 spent on the Debit Card. 
_#Loyalty point reward structure as well as reward of loyalty points for different merchant categories is subject to revision from time to time._
Gold Debit Card can be used online, for shopping, booking air/rail/movie tickets & utility bill payments. 
In addition to insurance cover for lost and counterfeit cards upto Rs. 2,00,000/- customers will also be covered for: 
  * Fire and Burglary for House Hold Contents - Rs. 50,000 

_*Effective 1st July 2013, for Insurance claims to be accepted and processed; there should be a minimum of 2 purchase transactions using the Debit Card in last 3 months prior to the event date._
We make tie-ups with different merchants from time to time to offer discounts to our Gold Debit Card holders. Customers can avail of this discount by making purchases through the Gold Debit Card at these merchant locations. 
Receive instant SMS alerts on transaction made on your Gold Debit Card.   
*Fee depends upon SOF of Scheme code of account under which account is opened.
As Mastercard Gold Debit Card are issued on the basis of account opening form, if you have not opted for card while opening the account and would like to avail the same, for further details
Call on our Phone Banking numbers - Toll Free - (24x7 service)
